scopeNote: Rerun covers the four assertions that remained unresolved after round 1: VAL-GL-003 and VAL-GL-014 were retested against the current contract after contract-alignment resets, and VAL-GL-011 plus VAL-GL-017 were rerun after their fix packets landed. With these four passing, all 40 fulfill-derived journal-and-account-core assertions are now passed.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the seeded API/DB rerun flow report for VAL-GL-003, VAL-GL-011, VAL-GL-014, and VAL-GL-017 after the delegated flow-validator Task helper failed.
Updated the journal-and-account-core user-testing synthesis to round 2 and marked the rerun as fully passing.
Promoted VAL-GL-003, VAL-GL-011, VAL-GL-014, and VAL-GL-017 from pending/failed to passed for the journal-and-account-core milestone.

environmentConstraints: The delegated user-testing-flow-validator Task helper exited without producing a report, so the rerun completed directly in-session using the seeded compose runtime and DB inspection.

The seeded MOCK runtime currently reports DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS readiness gaps in configuration-health even before targeted mutations, but the rerun proved the required FINISHED_GOOD_ACCOUNT, RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT, and TAX_ACCOUNT issue coverage by isolating each mutation and restoring the original values afterward.
